sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 36:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 36:1
items.html: The expansion of the light of Ein Sof for coupling by striking in the screen in the vessel of Malchut to raise reflected light is called a look. It is so because light that expands from Ein Sof is always regarded as the light of Hochma, called the light of Eynaim, sight, or look. (Part 3, Chapter 12, item 1)
